title: Help Shape the Future of Orton - Sam Carling
h1: Help Shape the Future of Orton
meta_description: Member of Parliament for North West Cambridgeshire
text_excerpt: Help Shape the Future of Orton - Sam Carling Skip to main content Sam Carling Member of Parliament for North West Cambridgeshire Join Get Involved Donate News Contact About Events Parliamentary Activity Help Shape the Future of Orton Columns More Menu Help Shape the Future of Orton A graphic stating "Your Local Labour MP has secured £20 million for Orton Malborne and Goldhay and you get to decide how it's spent!" Submit Your Ideas HERE Orton Goldhay and Malborne are set to benefit from £20 million of long-term funding through the Government’s Plan for Neighbourhoods . This is a huge opportunity to invest in the services, spaces and facilities that matter most to local residents. Alongside Orton, communities in Paston, Gunthorpe and the Welland, north of the river, will also receive £20 million of funding. This investment recognises the need to back neighbourhoods right across our region. I want this investment in the Ortons to be driven by the community itself – the people who know it best. That’s why I’m asking residents to share ideas and priorities for how the money should be used. Whether it’s improving youth services, creating safer streets, supporting local facilities, or something else entirely, your views will help guide the changes we can make together. This is about building a stronger future for Orton – one shaped by the people who live there. Submit Your Ideas HERE Sam Carling and Andrew Pakes out campaigning Sam Carling Contact details Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by and on behalf of Sam Carling at Unit 5, Swan Court Forder Way, Hampton, PE7 8GX ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
